blockReasons: no repository artifact currently derives a GeV-valued absolute scale from GU-only quantities
no validated internal-to-GeV dimensional bridge observable exists
no uncertainty model exists for a GU-derived GeV scale
closureRequirements: derive or materialize an internal absolute scale observable with units compatible with GeV
validate that the derivation does not use W or Z target masses

allowedExternalInputs: a disjoint electroweak scale observable such as a Fermi-constant-derived electroweak vacuum scale
a documented physical unit bridge that is not fitted to W or Z masses
blockReasons: no external scale artifact has been checked in with provenance and uncertainty
the repository does not yet expose a validated dimensionless bridge from the external input to the internal W/Z mass unit
using the external value directly as GeV per internal-mass-unit would be dimensionally unsupported
closureRequirements: add a sourced external/disjoint scale input artifact with value, uncertainty, date, and citation/provenance
add a validated internal bridge observable that connects that external scale to internal-mass-unit
prove the bridge excludes physical-w-boson-mass-gev and physical-z-boson-mass-gev

blockReasons: Phase52 rejected W-target and Z-target fit controls
target-fit scales cannot be used to claim independent W or Z absolute mass predictions

nextClosureSteps: choose either GU-derived scale construction or external disjoint scale intake
materialize the chosen source as a scale record satisfying the Phase52 projection contract
add bridge validation tests that reject W/Z target contamination
project W and Z masses only after a selected scale source exists
